name: Honoka Sawada
description: __Height:__ 150 cm Sawada is a very clingy towards Kyouko Hori. Due to her attachment to Hori, she often gets angry when Hori is together with Izumi Miyamura, choosing to push him away. She views Miyamura as a love rival, but also as a brotherly figure. She was very close to her older brother who passed away some years ago. name: Junko Konno
description: __Death:__ December 9, 1983 __Height:__ 155cm (5'1") Konno Junko was an idol from the 80s whose popularity caused the idol boom of said decade. She died in 1983 on a plane crash. She is titled as the Legendary Showa Idol. Junko seems to be calm, collected, little shy, but also a little serious if not daring. name: Kyouya Onodera
description: ~!Kyouya's immortality allow's him to take attacks that would usually kill someone, and it is shown when he is attacked that he can somewhat regenerate. Although he has immortality he can still feel pain to an extent.!~ ~!The price of his immortality is that he can only remember the last 2 years. He writes about his experiences in notebooks, so he can read them and remember past events.!~

name: Mikuru Asahina
description: **Height:** 152 cm (5 ft) **Occupation:** Student (grade 11-12), SOS Deputy Vice Commander, ~!Time Traveler!~ Mikuru Asahina, a shy and timid girl with a childish naïveté, is the only character other than [Kyon](https://anilist.co/character/252/Kyon) to be brought into the SOS Brigade against her will. Considered one of the most beautiful girls in high school, Mikuru is as kind, caring and thoughtful as she is beautiful. She easily gets scared or flustered, and is apparently prone to daydreaming

name: Desumi Magahara
description: Desumi Magahara is the deuteragonist of the manga Love After World Domination. She is a beautiful high school student, with blond hair and green eyes, her Gekko Battle Gear is a kind of erotic black demon-style outfit with bunny-like ears. Ever since young, her strength has been remarkable. It is so incomprehensible that she managed to close down a dojo unintentionally after defeating a dojo master there. Her family have some past and connections with Gekko, hence getting her involved with them

description: __Height:__ 172 cm __Likes:__ Working __Weakness:__ Easily angered __Birthplace:__ Unknown __Special skill__: Assassination One of the eight generals, he uses the weapon household's vessel "Balalark Sei." His loyalty towards Sinbad is so high that he'll approach anyone who insults him with murderous intent. When Sinbad does things as he pleases, Ja'far worries endlessly and sometimes even feels faint. name: Chika Takami
description: __Height:__ 157 cm Youngest of three sisters, a fan of μ's, and the leader of her school idol unit. Her family runs an inn, which boasts an open air bath with a view of the sea. A second year student.

name: Rachnera Arachnera
nativeName: ラチネラ・アラチネラ
description: __Species:__ Arachne Arriving to her first host family, the host family did not expect Rachnera to be a Arachne, which caused them to take a disliking to her. When a man offered them money for the rights as her host, they accepted. Being used as a way to make money by producing spider web the man could sell, she ran away from the man. While on the run she kidnapped Kurusu Kimihito, causing the police to search for him and her.

name: Shuuya Gouenji
description: He is the ace striker and voice of the reason of the team. His sister, Yuka is in a coma because of Kageyama's interference to stop him from play against Teikoku Academy. He keeps an amulet made by his sister, and makes a promise to her to stop playing soccer, but when he realizes his passion for the game, he changes that promise to become the champion of the Football Frontier. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Yuuichi Onodera
description: Punpun's uncle (Punpun's mom's brother) who is a 30-something freeter. He was previously a ceramics teacher, but he quit his job due to a certain incident. He looks after Punpun after Punpun's parents divorce. Women of all ages find him very attractive. He is bad at resisting the charms of beautiful women which leads him to several serious troubles in his life. Because of that, he finds humans to be ugly and detestable creatures and prefers to keep contact with other people to the minimum. ~!Aft

name: D
description: D is a dhampir, the half-breed child of a vampire father the legendary Vampire lord and human mother, therefore he makes the ideal vampire hunter. He is renowned for his consummate skill and unearthly grace, but feared and despised for his mixed lineage: born of both races but belonging to neither. Often underestimated by his opponents, D has surprising power and resourcefulness, possessing most of the strengths and only mild levels of vampiric weaknesses. Unlike most dhampirs, D is able to live

name: Kaguya
description: A mysterious girl from the Moon. Looking for fun, she decided to become a livestreamer in Tsukuyomi. She's energetic, outrageous and loves Iroha.
mediaTitles: Watashi wa, Watashi no Koto ga Suki.
searchTerms: Watashi wa, Watashi no Koto ga Suki.

name: Enkidu
description: Enkidu is known to be Gilgamesh's only true friend and much like him, they regard their friendship highly. While they may have the appearance of a human they're nothing more than a doll made of mud, shaped and given life by the Gods. Before assuming their current form and acquiring intellect and knowledge, they spent a long time roaming the forests and thus has a deep connection with nature. The task given to them was to reprimand Gilgamesh tyrannical behavior and bring him back into the service

description: __Height:__ 170 cm He is the charismatic president of the student council of Katagiri Senior High School who is enrolled in class 3-3, the childhood friend of Kyouko Hori and the boyfriend of Remi Ayasaki. Sengoku is a rather shy boy who gets embarrassed easily and he is a very wimpy where the slightest thing will make him cower in fear, especially things to do with horror or insects. description: Yuzuriha is the love interest of [Taiju](https://anilist.co/character/124146) and a friend of [Senkuu](https://anilist.co/character/124142). Yuzuriha is a young woman with brown hair, brown eyes, and a slim build. She has two noticeable petrification scars, both in the shape of spirals, located on her shoulder and neck. name: Maho Minami
description: Ryusuke's sister who is a talented singer with a strange relationship with Koyuki. At times she seems attracted to him, at others she brushes him off with little regard to his often ignored feelings.

name: Yuugi Mutou
description: __Height:__ 153 cm (5'0") Yugi Mutou is the main protagonist of Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters. At the start of the series, he is a shy boy who is really short for his age, something he always gets teased about in school. For this reason, he was always alone. However, his grandfather gives him the Millennium Puzzle prior to the story's time line and Yugi is told that if he solved it, one wish of his could be granted. He manages to solve the Millennium Puzzle and he asks for friends and his wish is imme

name: Kaoru Yamazaki
description: __Height:__ 169 cm (5'6") Tatsuhiro's former kouhai (Junior) in high school, who is an otaku. Tatsuhiro once stood up for him when he was still in middle school being beat up by some bullies, since then, he respected him greatly and decided to join the literature club with him when he went into high school. He is currently Tatsuhiro's neighbor and a college student aspiring to be a game creator.

name: Lina Inverse
description: Lina is the primary protagonist and the only character that appears in all incarnations of Slayers. She is an adolescent but very powerful sorceress, with a great love of money, treasure (especially the magical sort) and food. In the anime and manga (but not the light novel) Lina uses overly destructive magic recklessly (but comically), often with little provocation. She is reputed to be an evil, powerful, destructive, diminutive sorceress (the evil part isn't true). She has an older sister, Lun
